title: Clear Pencil Case for Exams, Maths Sets for Secondary School Exam Pencil Case with Protractor and Compass Set, Secondary Geometry Set Back to School Kit
features: 【Complete Exam Set】 - Package includes 1 clear pencil case, 3 pens, 3 pencils, 4 rulers,1 Sharpener, 1 Compass and 1 eraser. The maths set has all the geometry equipment needed for the maths exam.
【Clear Pencil Case】 - Made from PVC material, see through pencil case allows you to clearly see the contents inside, great for exam.
【Geometry Set】 - 1 straight ruler, 1 protractor, 2 square rulers and 1 Compass can accurately measure and draw geometric patterns, ideal for maths study.
【Provide Convenience】 - All essential stationery items are combined into one convenient set, suitable for high school, university, and college exams, providing convenience for student.
【Practical Set】 - Everything is neatly placed in the pencil case, keeping stationery in order and saving space in the backpack.
